Records.authors: Böttcher, Nico, Schwanemann, Niklas, Weinzierl, Stefan
Records.description: Two-loop box integral with fermion bubble insertion for electroweak corrections. Topology C: $m_2=m_Z$, $m_3=m_N$, $m_4=0$. Involves square roots $r_1$ and $r_3$. Relevant to P2 experiment (e-N scattering) with mixed massless/massive gauge bosons.
